title: Story Mode Legacy - Recreation
description: The Story Mode Legacy - Recreation (SML) brings ALL the content (Blocks, Items, etc.) from Minecraft Story Mode into normal Minecraft.
body:
# Story Mode Legacy - Recreation
Curios is requiried to mod work.
----------------------------------------

Story Mode Legacy – Recreation brings the entire universe of Minecraft: Story Mode into the classic Minecraft experience.
The goal of this project is to faithfully recreate blocks, items, mobs, structures, and mechanics inspired by the original game, while making them feel natural inside vanilla survival and adventure gameplay.

This is not just a cosmetic add-on. Every element is being carefully rebuilt: from iconic weapons and armor to rare artifacts, mysterious dimensions, and memorable enemies from the series. On top of that, the mod also includes extra and exclusive items, such as the Gauntlet of Xara and Fred, among others, to expand the experience beyond what was in the original game.

It’s important to note that the mod is still in its early stage of development. Almost everything is being recreated by a single developer (myself), with the exception of some resources that are being used with permission from their original authors (see credits). Many features are still temporary, experimental, or subject to significant changes. Items, mobs, textures, structures, and even entire systems may be improved, reworked, or completely replaced as updates roll out.

Planned content includes:

New weapons, armor, and crafting recipes.

Unique mobs and bosses with special abilities.

Custom dimensions and structures inspired by Story Mode lore.

More extra items and exclusive content created to complement the recreation.

Progressive updates to refine existing features and expand the world.

The long-term vision of Story Mode Legacy – Recreation is to build a complete and immersive recreation of Story Mode inside Minecraft, while keeping it balanced and enjoyable for survival, exploration, and adventure.


<details>
<summary>Progress Log</summary>

Jesse's Life: BeaconTown, Tree House,: UNFINISHED (Working on it)✅

Towns: Champion City, BoownTown and Redstonia: UNFINISHED (Working on it)✅

Old and New Order Of Stone: Amulet, Gabriel Fortress, EnderCon, Soren Fortress, Armors, etc:, UNFINISHED (Working on it) ✅

Fancy Armors: Dragon Defeat, Dragon Bane, etc: UNFINISHED (Working on it)✅

Sea Temple: The Prismarine Colossus, the structural blocks, Prismarine Blocks, etc: UNFINISHED

Giant Consequences: Romeo (Ice Form), Mobs, Ice Palace: UNFINISHED

Order UP: Sky City, Eversource, dimension, portal hall, jungle temple, etc: UNFINISHED (Working on it)✅

Mystery Portal: White Pumpkin, The Mansion, Dimension, etc: UNFINISHED

Acess Denied: PAMA BOSS, Redstone Heart, CrownMesa, Dimension, Controlled Mobs, etc: UNFINISHED (Working on it)

Command Block: The Command Block, Command Block Book, Command Block Tools: Added✅
 
Old Builders: Tim Armor, The games, SnowTown, The Portal Atlas, etc: UNFINISHED (Working on this)✅


⚠️The UnderNeath Update: Will be one of the largest updates ever made, adding new structures, mobs, and challenges.

It will be divided into two parts, with no release date set:

Part 1 – Below Everything: will include the Sunshine Institute, the Obsidian Maze, the Three Head Ghast, the Giant Enderman, and more. (not necessarily as a boss). There is also a possibility that the Bedrock ceiling will be recreated, but it is not guaranteed.

Part 2 – Beyond Everything: will feature the Oasis, Fred’s Keep, RomeoBurg, the Romeo Challenge, and more things. As with Part 1, the Bedrock ceiling may or may not be added.
*This update will require a lot of work, since it involves many systems and details.*

Terminal Space: Dimension, Portal, Romeo Final Boss, etc: Not started (Will be done much later)


<details>
<summary>Update Log 1.0</summary>

🔹 Added:

Colored Lamps (all variants)

Order of the Stone Amulet (no function)

Blue and Green Flint and Steel

Atlas of the Portals

Crown of the EverSource

All variants of the Gauntlets

Red Obsidian

Ivor’s Elixir

Soren’s Blueprint

Ultimate Tools

PAMA’s Redstone Heart

Command Block Book (with the function to craft the Ultimate Tools)

⚙️ Notes

The next update will bring even more content, including Prismarine Blocks, the Command Block, the Order of the Stone Temple, Old Builders Jungle Temple, Maybe the StructureBlock Warrior & Builder, new items and tools, and possibly armor sets (if the models are finished in time).
Characters like Reuben and Lluna are also planned! 🐷🐎

⚠️ Note: This first release is meant for testing purposes only and is not recommended for Survival Mode.
Bugs may occur — if you find any, please contact me on Discord.

</details>



</details>


<details>
<summary>Update Pre-Alpha 2.0</summary>

SML — Pre-Alpha 2.0 Changelog

Previous version: Alpha 1.0
New version: Pre-Alpha 2.0


---

Changes & Additions

New Stone Block
Added a new type of stone.
No crafting recipe available yet.

Warrior and Builder Structural Blocks
Added two new structure blocks: Warrior and Builder.
Currently bugged — structures may not spawn properly.

Atlas of Portals (Item)
A new item has been added.
Main functionality still under development.

Texture Fixes
Fixed textures for the Gauntlets and the Amulet.

Ivor’s Elixir
Added a new mysterious item.

Romeo’s Armor
Romeo’s full armor set is now available.
Can only be obtained in Creative Mode or through the Admin Panel.

New Paintings

1. The Three Admins


2. Jesse’s World Map


3. The UnderNeath Map





---

Important Notes

Order of the Stone Time Event
Added the Order of the Stone time system.
However, there may still be issues with its spawn configuration.
Expect possible bugs — please report any you find.



---

Developer Notes

This is Pre-Alpha 2.0, and development continues.
More features will be added

</details>


<details>
<summary>Update Log Alpha 3.0 Part 1</summary>

Story Mode Legacy - Recriacion Alpha 3.0 Part 1


---

Additions Related to the Admins

Fred’s Armor added.

Fred Admin Power added (panel access not available yet).

Xara’s Armor added.

Xara Admin Power added (panel access not available yet).

The Foundation Book — written by Fred.

Prismarine Gauntlet Pedestal added.

Prison Zombie added.

Gold Gauntlet Holder added.

New functions added to Romeo’s Admin Panel (along with new textures).



---

Additions Related to the Order of the Stone

Full Magnus Armor added.

Withered Star added (no natural way to obtain it yet).



---

Mysterys & Secrets Update

Portal Network added.

Sky Dimension added — includes SkyCity and its Overworld counterpart.

2 new Flint and Steels added.

Ice Leaks Dimension added.



---

Sea Temple Update

Prismarine Stone added.

Chiseled Prismarine Stone Bricks added.



---

Extras and Improvements

Flint and Steel textures have been reworked.

New additional achievements added.

Several other textures have been improved.

The generation bug of the Order’s Temple has been “fixed.”

Removed the last paintings and added a test painting (a very sad one…).

⚙️ Important Notes

Some items are still in testing phases (such as the Withered Star) and may be removed or redesigned in the future.

You can now obtain Smooth Stone by placing regular Stone in the Stonecutter.

Regarding Sky City, its Overworld is currently being reworked — it was kept together with the main city.

If you use the command /execute in smlr:sky_city ..., note that the exit portal will not appear unless you enter the dimension through the Portal Network.

The SkyCity and Portal Network dimensions are large structures, so they may take a while to load (especially SkyCity, which may take 4 to 8 minutes).

This delay is due to Minecraft’s own generation system, not the mod itself.

If you have a low-end PC, it is highly recommended to lower your graphics settings to avoid lag or crashes.

If you can't enter Sky City through the Portal Network (either due to lag or something like that) run the command /execute in smlr:skyc_city run tp youuser ~ ~ ~

Currently, there is no natural way to obtain the new Flints and Steels or to enter the Portal Network except via SkyCity’s portal or by using /execute in.

However, in the next update, the Jungle Temple structure will be added — where Jesse obtains the Enchanted Flint and Steel and the story arc begins.




---

⚠️ Final Note

Many things may still cause errors or bugs, so please report any issues on the Discord server’s “Bugs” channel.
Thank you for your support! 



</details>

Extras 🧪

You can now equip all three Gauntlets (Prismarine Gauntlet, Champion Gauntlet, and Gold Gauntlet) using Curios.
(For NeoForge version 1.21.1 only, Curios was not compatible with version 1.20.1. I will try to fix it so that it is supported by both versions.)


---

Notices

All armor texture bugs and other related visual issues have been completely fixed.

Several models, textures, and other visual elements may still be reworked in future updates.
If you find any bugs related to these, please report them on the server’s Discord.



</details>



#  FAQ:

Will there be Fabric support?

No. The mod will not support Fabric, I won’t be remaking everything from scratch.

Will there be updates for 1.20.1+?

Maybe. My plan is to keep it on 1.20.1 (possibly up to 1.21.4), but I can’t guarantee future updates.

How can I report bugs?

You can contact me on Discord. I plan to create a dedicated server for that, but not right now.
➡️ User: @wwwcorestudios

Can I use this mod in my Modpack?

Yes, as long as you give proper credit.

How can I make a partnership?

Just reach out to me on Discord.

Can I use any of your textures or models?

Not without my authorization. Send me a message on Discord so I can review and decide if I’ll allow it.

Do updates take long to release?
 
It depends. Some updates are easier and faster, but others, like The UnderNeath, are much harder and take longer.

 📜Credits
--------------------------
Discord Server: https://discord.gg/zSHaGbXse7 (Working)

Modeling, Programming & Mod Expansion – WwWCore Studios (author of Story Mode Legacy – Recreation).

Minecraft: Story Mode – A work by Mojang and Telltale Games.

Music - Antimo & Welles
